sentences.english: My favorite TV show is a cartoon about animals.
sentences.korean: 가장 좋아하는 TV 프로는 동물에 관한 만화예요.

sentences.english: It comes on every Saturday morning at nine.
The main character is a rabbit who goes on adventures.
Every episode teaches an important lesson about friendship or honesty.
sentences.korean: 매 에피소드마다 우정이나 정직에 대한 중요한 교훈을 알려줘요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: How to Make Friends in a New City
